title: Who's running to represent Wyoming in Congress?
shortDescription: The Cowboy State will likely send Republicans to Congress in November, but that's to be decided by primary voters on Aug. 20.

title: Court reverses itself on Arizona voter registration rules
shortDescription: Arizonans can register to vote without providing proof of citizenship, a 9th Circuit Court order states. But they're limited to federal elections.

title: Homeless Georgians to face restrictions under new election law
shortDescription: Starting in 2025, non-residential addresses will no longer be accepted for voter registration. Advocates for the homeless are sounding the alarm.

title: Biden, Harris greet freed prisoners on US soil after being released from Russia
shortDescription: The historic swap followed months of negotiations by the Biden administration and other nations, and involved 24 prisoners across six countries.

title: Tenn. gun-control advocate wins Senate primary, will face Blackburn
shortDescription: Gloria Johnson rose to national prominence as a member of the Tennessee Three but faces an uphill battle in November against incumbent Blackburn.

title: First female White House executive chef Cristeta Comerford retires
shortDescription: Cristeta Comerford, who joined the White House kitchen under Clinton, was the first female and first woman of color to hold the executive chef title.

title: Did Harris post about Trump and Epstein? No, it's fake | Fact check
shortDescription: The post doesn't appear on Harris' verified social media accounts. A spokesperson for her campaign said the post is not real.

title: Republicans avoid talking about Harris' race, Trump can't help himself
shortDescription: Republican senators say they're focused on attacking Kamala Harris on policy, but Donald Trump can't help himself from talking about her race.

title: Pennsylvania officials reveal limited info on Trump shooter's autopsy
shortDescription: Butler County Coroner William Young released a one-page autopsy summary of the man who attempted to kill former President Donald Trump.

title: Maricopa County election administration post GOP primary ousts incumbent
shortDescription: In Tuesday's Republican primary, incumbent Stephen Richer lost to right-wing challenger Justin Heap in Maricopa County recorder race.

title: Bipartisan group calls on lawyers to protect election, punish subversion
shortDescription: Lawyers should be held accountable for their efforts to overturn the 2020 election, a bipartisan American Bar Association task force said.

title: Biden sings 'happy birthday' to 13-year-old
shortDescription: While speaking about the prisoner swap deal, Joe Biden invited one of the released prisoner's daughter up for her 13th birthday.

title: Lake, Gallego deliver opening salvos after Arizona Senate primary
shortDescription: Arizona's Senate race features a Democrat vs. Republican matchup that could help determine which party controls the upper chamber in 2025.
